title: eriogonum nudum var. westonii
intro: Eriogonum nudum var. westonii, also known as California buckwheat, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the Polygonaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, while its leaves can be used as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Eriogonum nudum var. westonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or poultice, and its leaves and stems can be used to make a topical salve or ointment for skin issues.
